stemHtml: Your aircraft is equipped with steel brakes. How can the pilot maximise braking performance?

options.a: Frequent light taps on the brakes because the brakes are limited by the amount of times brakes are pressed.
options.b: Few firm taps on the brakes because the brakes are limited by heat.
options.c: Few firm taps on the brakes because the brakes are limited by the amount of times brakes are pressed.​​​​​​​
options.d: Frequent light taps on the brakes because the brakes are limited by heat.
